So i'm looking at what you gain and give up compared to running "Pure"/with Chaos Awakers.
Essentially, you give up:
■ Deep Sea Symbiosis: At the start of battle, for each Chaos Awaker in the team, increase base tentacle damage by 1% of max HP. After Chaos Awakers use Aliemus Burst, gain 1 layer of Tentacle Assembly and all Deep Sea Awakers gain 10 Aliemus.
■ Caro Symbiosis: At the end of each turn, for each Chaos Awaker in the team, accumulate 2% of max HP in the Crimson Furnace. After Chaos Awakers use Aliemus Burst, Embryo Fusion +25%.
■ Ultra Symbiosis: At the start of battle, for each Chaos Awaker in the team, permanently increase ally power by 1% of max HP and reduce all enemies' power by 0.5% of max HP, while increasing all Ultra Awakers' critical damage by 10%.

And:
○ Pure Deep Sea: If the team consists only of Deep Sea Awakers, the Deep Sea Mastery attribute effect is doubled, and the number of tentacles generated at the start of battle is doubled.
○ Pure Caro: If the team consists only of Caro Awakers, the Caro Mastery attribute effect is doubled, and the base accumulation of the Crimson Furnace at the end of the battle is doubled.
○ Pure Ultra: If the team consists only of Ultra Awakers, the Ultra Mastery attribute effect is doubled, and the Ultra Turn effect is not halved.
So essentially:
If you're all in on Tentacles, you might want to stay Pure Aequor.
If you're all in on Furnace, you might want to stay Pure Caro.
If you make good use of your Ultra Turn or Symbiosis, you might want to stay Pure Ultra.
